obj.content: What is the maximum number of people who can stand on each side of the boat?
obj.html_content: What is the maximum number of people who can stand on each side of the boat?

obj.content: What colour are the tour boats?
obj.html_content: What colour are the tour boats?

obj.content: Which lunchbox is suitable for someone who doesn't eat meat or fish?
obj.html_content: Which lunchbox is suitable for someone who doesn't eat meat or fish?

obj.content: What should people do with their litter?
obj.html_content: What should people do with their litter?

obj.content: hand it to a member of staff
obj.html_content: hand it to a member of staff

obj.content: put it in the bins provided on the boat
obj.html_content: put it in the bins provided on the boat

sentence.content: So, hello everyone.
sentence.content_zh: 所以,大家好。

sentence.content: My name’s Lou Miller and I’m going to be your tour guide today as we take this fantastic boat trip around the Tasmanian coast.
sentence.content_zh: 我叫卢·米勒，今天我是你们的导游，带领你们乘船游览塔斯马尼亚海岸。

sentence.content: Before we set off, I just want to tell you a few things about our journey.
sentence.content_zh: 在我们出发之前，我只想告诉你一些关于我们旅程的事情。

sentence.content: Our boats aren’t huge as you can see.
sentence.content_zh: 正如你们见到的，我们的船并不大。

sentence.content: We already have three staff members on board and on top of that, we can transport a further fifteen people – that’s you – around the coastline.
sentence.content_zh: 船上已经有三名工作人员，在此基础上，我们还可以再运载十五人——也就是你们——围绕海岸线游览。

sentence.content: But please note if there are more than nine people on either side of the boat, we’ll move some of you over, otherwise all eighteen of us will end up in the sea!
sentence.content_zh: 但请注意，如果船的任何一侧超过九个人，我们会将一些人移到另一侧，否则我们十八个人都会落入海中！

sentence.content: We’ve recently upgraded all our boats.
sentence.content_zh: 我们最近升级了所有的船。

sentence.content: They used to be jet black, but our new ones now have these comfortable dark red seats and a light-green exterior in order to stand out from others and help promote our company.
sentence.content_zh: 以前是漆黑的，但新的船现在配备舒适的深红色座椅，并且外部是浅绿色，和其他船相比更加醒目，可以帮助宣传我们的公司。

sentence.content: This gives our boats a rather unique appearance, don’t you think?
sentence.content_zh: 这让我们的船看起来很独特，不是吗?

sentence.content: We offer you a free lunchbox during the trip and we have three types.
sentence.content_zh: 我们在旅途中提供免费午餐，有三种。

sentence.content: Lunchbox 1 contains ham and tomato sandwiches.
sentence.content_zh: 午餐盒1里有火腿和西红柿三明治。

sentence.content: Lunchbox 2 contains a cheddar cheese roll and Lunchbox 3 is salad-based and also contains eggs and tuna.
sentence.content_zh: 午餐盒2里有切达奶酪卷，午餐盒3里有沙拉，还有鸡蛋和金枪鱼。

sentence.content: All three lunchboxes also have a packet of crisps and chocolate bar inside.
sentence.content_zh: 三个午餐盒里面都有一包薯片和巧克力棒。

sentence.content: Please let staff know which lunchbox you prefer.
sentence.content_zh: 请告知员工您喜欢哪种午餐盒。

sentence.content: I’m sure I don’t have to ask you not to throw anything into the sea.
sentence.content_zh: 我相信不用我要求你们不要往海里扔东西。

sentence.content: We don’t have any bins to put litter in, but Jess, myself or Ray, our other guide, will collect it from you after lunch and put it all in a large plastic sack.
sentence.content_zh: 我们没有垃圾箱可以放垃圾，但杰西、我和另一位导游雷会在午饭后从你们那里收集垃圾，然后把它们都放进一个大塑料袋里。

sentence.content: The engine on the boat makes quite a lot of noise so before we head off, let me tell you a few things about what you’re going to see.
sentence.content_zh: 船上的引擎会发出很大的噪音，所以在我们出发之前，让我告诉你们一些你们将会看到的东西。

sentence.content: This area is famous for its ancient lighthouse, which you’ll see from the boat as we turn past the first little island.
sentence.content_zh: 这个地区以其古老的灯塔而闻名，当我们驶过第一个小岛时，你可以从船上看到它。

sentence.content: It was built in 1838 to protect sailors as a number of shipwrecks had led to significant loss of life.
sentence.content_zh: 它（灯塔）建于1838年。建造灯塔是为了保护水手，因为之前发生了多起沉船事故，导致大量人员丧命。

sentence.content: The construction itself was complicated as some of the original drawings kept by the local council show.
sentence.content_zh: 正如当地议会保存的一些原始图纸所显示的那样，建筑本身很复杂。

sentence.content: It sits right on top of the cliffs in a very isolated spot.
sentence.content_zh: 它坐落在悬崖上一个非常偏僻的地方。

sentence.content: In the nineteenth century there were many jobs there, such as polishing the brass lamps, chopping firewood and cleaning windows, that kept lighthouse keepers busy.
sentence.content_zh: 在19世纪，那里有很多工作（要做），比如擦亮黄铜灯、劈柴和擦窗户，这些都让灯塔看守人很忙。

sentence.content: These workers were mainly prison convicts until the middle of that century when ordinary families willing to live in such circumstances took over.
sentence.content_zh: 这些工人主要是监狱里的罪犯，直到该世纪中叶，那些愿意接受这种生活环境的普通家庭才接手（这些工作）。

sentence.content: Some of you have asked me what creatures we can expect to see.
sentence.content_zh: 有些人问我，我们能看到什么生物。

sentence.content: I know everyone loves the penguins, but they’re very shy and, unfortunately, tend to hide from passing boats, but you might see birds in the distance, such as sea eagles, flying around the cliff edges where they nest.
sentence.content_zh: 我知道每个人都喜欢企鹅，但它们非常害羞，而且遗憾的是，它们往往会躲避过往的船只，但你可能会在远处看到鸟类，比如海雕，在它们筑巢的悬崖边飞行。

sentence.content: When we get to the rocky area inhabited by fur seals, we’ll stop and watch them swimming around the coast.
sentence.content_zh: 当到达海狗居住的岩石地区时，我们会停下来，观看它们在海边游泳。

sentence.content: They’re inquisitive creatures so don’t be surprised if one pops up right in front of you.
sentence.content_zh: 海狗是一种好奇心很强的动物，所以如果某一只恰好出现在你面前，也请不要惊讶。

sentence.content: Their predators, orca whales, hunt along the coastline too, but spotting one of these is rare.
sentence.content_zh: 它们的天敌虎鲸也会在沿海区域捕食，可它们的身影却很难捕捉。

sentence.content: Dolphins, on the other hand, can sometimes approach on their own or in groups as they ride the waves beside us.
sentence.content_zh: 然而，海豚有时会独自或成群结队地接近（船只），在我们身边乘浪而行。

sentence.content: Lastly, I want to mention the caves.
sentence.content_zh: 最后，我想提一下洞穴。

sentence.content: Tasmania is famous for its caves and the ones we’ll pass by are so amazing that people are lost for words when they see them.
sentence.content_zh: 塔斯马尼亚岛以其洞穴而闻名，我们路过的那些洞穴非常神奇，以至于人们看到它们时都说不出话来。

sentence.content: They can only be approached by sea, but if you feel that you want to see more than we’re able to show you, then you can take a kayak into the area on another day and one of our staff will give you more information on that.
sentence.content_zh: 我们只能从海上接近他们，但如果你觉得你想看的比我们所能展示的更多，那么你可以改天乘皮艇进入该地区，我们的工作人员会为你提供更多信息。

sentence.content: What we’ll do is to go through a narrow channel, past some incredible rock formations and from there we’ll be able to see the openings to the caves, and at that point we’ll talk to you about what lies beyond.
sentence.content_zh: 我们将穿过一条狭窄的水道，经过一些令人啧啧称奇的岩层，之后会看到洞穴的入口，那时我们会再向您介绍洞穴内部的情况。

Choose
TWO
letters,
A-E
.

obj.content: Which [b] TWO [/b] features of the lighthouse does Lou mention?
obj.html_content: Which TWO features of the lighthouse does Lou mention?

obj.content: how long it took to build
obj.html_content: how long it took to build

sentence.content: Their predators, orca whales, hunt along the coastline too, but spotting one of these is rare.
sentence.content_zh: 它们的天敌虎鲸也会在沿海区域捕食，可它们的身影却很难捕捉。

sentence.content: Dolphins, on the other hand, can sometimes approach on their own or in groups as they ride the waves beside us.
sentence.content_zh: 然而，海豚有时会独自或成群结队地接近（船只），在我们身边乘浪而行。

sentence.content: Lastly, I want to mention the caves.
sentence.content_zh: 最后，我想提一下洞穴。

sentence.content: Tasmania is famous for its caves and the ones we’ll pass by are so amazing that people are lost for words when they see them.
sentence.content_zh: 塔斯马尼亚岛以其洞穴而闻名，我们路过的那些洞穴非常神奇，以至于人们看到它们时都说不出话来。

sentence.content: They can only be approached by sea, but if you feel that you want to see more than we’re able to show you, then you can take a kayak into the area on another day and one of our staff will give you more information on that.
sentence.content_zh: 我们只能从海上接近他们，但如果你觉得你想看的比我们所能展示的更多，那么你可以改天乘皮艇进入该地区，我们的工作人员会为你提供更多信息。

sentence.content: What we’ll do is to go through a narrow channel, past some incredible rock formations and from there we’ll be able to see the openings to the caves, and at that point we’ll talk to you about what lies beyond.
sentence.content_zh: 我们将穿过一条狭窄的水道，经过一些令人啧啧称奇的岩层，之后会看到洞穴的入口，那时我们会再向您介绍洞穴内部的情况。

obj.content: Which [b] TWO [/b]  points does Lou make about the caves?
obj.html_content: Which TWO points does Lou make about the caves?

obj.content: Only large tourist boats can visit them.
obj.html_content: Only large tourist boats can visit them.

obj.content: The entrances to them are often blocked.
obj.html_content: The entrances to them are often blocked.

obj.content: It is too dangerous for individuals to go near them.
obj.html_content: It is too dangerous for individuals to go near them.

obj.html_content: Someone will explain what is inside them.

obj.content: They cannot be reached on foot.
obj.html_content: They cannot be reached on foot.

sentence.content: So, hello everyone.
sentence.content_zh: 所以,大家好。

sentence.content: My name’s Lou Miller and I’m going to be your tour guide today as we take this fantastic boat trip around the Tasmanian coast.
sentence.content_zh: 我叫卢·米勒，今天我是你们的导游，带领你们乘船游览塔斯马尼亚海岸。

sentence.content: Before we set off, I just want to tell you a few things about our journey.
sentence.content_zh: 在我们出发之前，我只想告诉你一些关于我们旅程的事情。

sentence.content: Our boats aren’t huge as you can see.
sentence.content_zh: 正如你们见到的，我们的船并不大。

sentence.content: We already have three staff members on board and on top of that, we can transport a further fifteen people – that’s you – around the coastline.
sentence.content_zh: 船上已经有三名工作人员，在此基础上，我们还可以再运载十五人——也就是你们——围绕海岸线游览。

sentence.content: But please note if there are more than nine people on either side of the boat, we’ll move some of you over, otherwise all eighteen of us will end up in the sea!
sentence.content_zh: 但请注意，如果船的任何一侧超过九个人，我们会将一些人移到另一侧，否则我们十八个人都会落入海中！

sentence.content: We’ve recently upgraded all our boats.
sentence.content_zh: 我们最近升级了所有的船。

sentence.content: They used to be jet black, but our new ones now have these comfortable dark red seats and a light-green exterior in order to stand out from others and help promote our company.
sentence.content_zh: 以前是漆黑的，但新的船现在配备舒适的深红色座椅，并且外部是浅绿色，和其他船相比更加醒目，可以帮助宣传我们的公司。

sentence.content: This gives our boats a rather unique appearance, don’t you think?
sentence.content_zh: 这让我们的船看起来很独特，不是吗?

sentence.content: We offer you a free lunchbox during the trip and we have three types.
sentence.content_zh: 我们在旅途中提供免费午餐，有三种。

sentence.content: Lunchbox 1 contains ham and tomato sandwiches.
sentence.content_zh: 午餐盒1里有火腿和西红柿三明治。

sentence.content: Lunchbox 2 contains a cheddar cheese roll and Lunchbox 3 is salad-based and also contains eggs and tuna.
sentence.content_zh: 午餐盒2里有切达奶酪卷，午餐盒3里有沙拉，还有鸡蛋和金枪鱼。

sentence.content: All three lunchboxes also have a packet of crisps and chocolate bar inside.
sentence.content_zh: 三个午餐盒里面都有一包薯片和巧克力棒。

sentence.content: Please let staff know which lunchbox you prefer.
sentence.content_zh: 请告知员工您喜欢哪种午餐盒。

sentence.content: I’m sure I don’t have to ask you not to throw anything into the sea.
sentence.content_zh: 我相信不用我要求你们不要往海里扔东西。

sentence.content: We don’t have any bins to put litter in, but Jess, myself or Ray, our other guide, will collect it from you after lunch and put it all in a large plastic sack.
sentence.content_zh: 我们没有垃圾箱可以放垃圾，但杰西、我和另一位导游雷会在午饭后从你们那里收集垃圾，然后把它们都放进一个大塑料袋里。

sentence.content: The engine on the boat makes quite a lot of noise so before we head off, let me tell you a few things about what you’re going to see.
sentence.content_zh: 船上的引擎会发出很大的噪音，所以在我们出发之前，让我告诉你们一些你们将会看到的东西。

sentence.content: This area is famous for its ancient lighthouse, which you’ll see from the boat as we turn past the first little island.
sentence.content_zh: 这个地区以其古老的灯塔而闻名，当我们驶过第一个小岛时，你可以从船上看到它。

sentence.content: It was built in 1838 to protect sailors as a number of shipwrecks had led to significant loss of life.
sentence.content_zh: 它（灯塔）建于1838年。建造灯塔是为了保护水手，因为之前发生了多起沉船事故，导致大量人员丧命。

sentence.content: The construction itself was complicated as some of the original drawings kept by the local council show.
sentence.content_zh: 正如当地议会保存的一些原始图纸所显示的那样，建筑本身很复杂。

sentence.content: It sits right on top of the cliffs in a very isolated spot.
sentence.content_zh: 它坐落在悬崖上一个非常偏僻的地方。

sentence.content: In the nineteenth century there were many jobs there, such as polishing the brass lamps, chopping firewood and cleaning windows, that kept lighthouse keepers busy.
sentence.content_zh: 在19世纪，那里有很多工作（要做），比如擦亮黄铜灯、劈柴和擦窗户，这些都让灯塔看守人很忙。

sentence.content: These workers were mainly prison convicts until the middle of that century when ordinary families willing to live in such circumstances took over.
sentence.content_zh: 这些工人主要是监狱里的罪犯，直到该世纪中叶，那些愿意接受这种生活环境的普通家庭才接手（这些工作）。

sentence.content: Some of you have asked me what creatures we can expect to see.
sentence.content_zh: 有些人问我，我们能看到什么生物。

sentence.content: I know everyone loves the penguins, but they’re very shy and, unfortunately, tend to hide from passing boats, but you might see birds in the distance, such as sea eagles, flying around the cliff edges where they nest.
sentence.content_zh: 我知道每个人都喜欢企鹅，但它们非常害羞，而且遗憾的是，它们往往会躲避过往的船只，但你可能会在远处看到鸟类，比如海雕，在它们筑巢的悬崖边飞行。

sentence.content: When we get to the rocky area inhabited by fur seals, we’ll stop and watch them swimming around the coast.
sentence.content_zh: 当到达海狗居住的岩石地区时，我们会停下来，观看它们在海边游泳。

sentence.content: They’re inquisitive creatures so don’t be surprised if one pops up right in front of you.
sentence.content_zh: 海狗是一种好奇心很强的动物，所以如果某一只恰好出现在你面前，也请不要惊讶。

sentence.content: Their predators, orca whales, hunt along the coastline too, but spotting one of these is rare.
sentence.content_zh: 它们的天敌虎鲸也会在沿海区域捕食，可它们的身影却很难捕捉。

sentence.content: Dolphins, on the other hand, can sometimes approach on their own or in groups as they ride the waves beside us.
sentence.content_zh: 然而，海豚有时会独自或成群结队地接近（船只），在我们身边乘浪而行。

sentence.content: Lastly, I want to mention the caves.
sentence.content_zh: 最后，我想提一下洞穴。

sentence.content: Tasmania is famous for its caves and the ones we’ll pass by are so amazing that people are lost for words when they see them.
sentence.content_zh: 塔斯马尼亚岛以其洞穴而闻名，我们路过的那些洞穴非常神奇，以至于人们看到它们时都说不出话来。

sentence.content: They can only be approached by sea, but if you feel that you want to see more than we’re able to show you, then you can take a kayak into the area on another day and one of our staff will give you more information on that.
sentence.content_zh: 我们只能从海上接近他们，但如果你觉得你想看的比我们所能展示的更多，那么你可以改天乘皮艇进入该地区，我们的工作人员会为你提供更多信息。

sentence.content: What we’ll do is to go through a narrow channel, past some incredible rock formations and from there we’ll be able to see the openings to the caves, and at that point we’ll talk to you about what lies beyond.
sentence.content_zh: 我们将穿过一条狭窄的水道，经过一些令人啧啧称奇的岩层，之后会看到洞穴的入口，那时我们会再向您介绍洞穴内部的情况。
